## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and future initiatives for Attention\<\>GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends: 50% increase in weekly clicks, 100% increase in impressions (20k total)](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New content clusters focused on sales engagement, calls, and revenue intelligence; prioritizing sales call QA topics](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO opportunities (e.g., industry directories, use cases) for potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [60 articles published and indexed](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [50% increase in weekly clicks, 100% increase in impressions (20k total)](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Monitoring individual article performance for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Planning to double down on high-performing topics after gathering more data](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [New clusters: sales engagement, sales calls, revenue intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Prioritizing sales call QA topics (rows 19-37 in assignments)](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Developed strategy based on best-performing non-brand keywords (past 90 days)](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Planning to categorize topics by funnel stage (top, middle, bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Metadata Optimization

  - [Optimizing metadata for 15 high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Revamping SEO titles and meta descriptions for improved clickability](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Monitoring performance changes post-optimization](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization

  - [Discussed potential for adding lead magnets and conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Current blog conversion rate benchmark: \~0.3-0.5% (from Kyle's experience)](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Agreed to prioritize this later when traffic increases significantly](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Identified scrolling issue on blog pages; team to investigate and address](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### Content Authority and Backlinks

  - [Discussed importance of content depth and backlinks for improving domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Explored potential strategies for acquiring high-quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Considered leveraging customer relationships for backlink opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

### Article Refreshes

  - [20 articles refreshed, planning to increase to 10 refreshes per week](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Will monitor and report on performance of refreshed articles in future syncs](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to revamp Airtable with topic clusters, themes, and funnel stages for better strategy overview](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Investigate and address scrolling issue on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Stewart to follow up on Slack about programmatic SEO ideas (directories, use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Team to explore strategies for improving domain authority and acquiring quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing content performance, especially newly refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/H2QxCDs4zE2rUEPYuWKhPFyr15JAzB1Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
